name: a namespace promoted with stack-add is revealed as activated true via stack
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --stack-add helm --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); fs=d["full_surface"]; e=fs.find{|x|x["namespace"]=="helm"}; exit(e && e["activated"]==true && e["via"]=="stack" ? 0:1)' && echo stack-promotes-reveal 1>&2
